title: DLG The world of drawings
description: The DLG The world of drawings offers the player a pocket dimension in the form of a small 16x16 cube, where experiments can be carried out without polluting the main world. Using a special remote control, you can move between this cube and the real world
body: Sometimes, building complex structures from various mods, you can't help but doubt their performance. The DLG The world of drawings mod provides the player with a small pocket dimension that can be used for various experiments and experiments without spoiling or polluting the main world. The mod adds a remote control, and when you right-click it, the player is transported to a small blue cube measuring 16x16, in which you can experiment. When you right-click the remote control again, the player is transported to the normal world.
